message:
feat(parser,svg): add generic type parameters to class diagrams and cluster dividers

Extend the class diagram parser to extract generic type parameters
from Mermaid's ~T~ syntax (e.g., List~T~, Map~K,V~) and propagate
them through the IR via set_class_generics(). The BlockStart variant
now carries a Vec<String> of generic type params alongside the name.

Add SVG rendering support for cluster dividers — dashed separator
lines within state diagram concurrent regions, rendered as styled
<line> elements with proper span metadata when source spans are
enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
